message:
Apply rustfmt and lint cleanup across TLS, database, service, and test files

Formatting-only changes with no behavioral impact:

- tls/acceptor.rs, tls/connector.rs: Reflow ALPN protocol check chains
  to comply with rustfmt line-length limits
- database/postgres.rs: Reflow clippy allow attribute lists
- service/service.rs: Reflow timeout builder chain
- gen_server.rs: Reorder imports to standard grouping
- sync/mod.rs: Remove trailing blank line
- tests/notify_bug.rs: Replace assert_eq!(x, false) with assert!(!x)
  per clippy bool_assert_comparison lint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
